overall.description: First-person exploration of a gritty cyberpunk apartment in a video game. The player character moves from a neon-lit sleeping pod through a messy living space, exits into a graffiti-covered hallway, and enters an elevator. The environment features industrial architecture with prominent cyan neon lighting and scattered debris.

events.description: camera pans toward sleeping pod revealing bright cyan neon illumination

stacked cardboard boxes on the floor next to shelving
poster of a figure on the wall above the desk area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom. The camera pans from a cluttered desk area toward a futuristic sleeping pod bathed in cyan neon light. A wall-mounted television displays a news broadcast as the player explores the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: messy apartment living area with kitchen

events.description: exits bedroom area into main apartment living space with kitchen

agents.ego_description: walking through the messy apartment toward the exit, passing kitchen cabinets and a vending machine

white kitchen cabinetry along the right wall
scattered debris and trash covering the tile floor

worn leather chair near the vending machine area
doorway leading out of the apartment into the building hallway

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the bedroom into a larger living area featuring a kitchen, scattered trash, and a vending machine. The space has a gritty, lived-in appearance with ceiling fans and natural light filtering through windows. The camera approaches the apartment exit doorway.

events.description: exits apartment into dimly lit building hallway with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward the elevator, passing shelves and graffiti

entered.detail: colorful spray paint graffiti covering the hallway walls
empty wooden shelves mounted against the hallway walls
pink and blue neon signs visible through grated windows
metal elevator doors at the end of the hallway
overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The player exits the apartment into a narrow, grimy hallway with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. Neon signs glow through grated windows as the camera moves toward the elevator at the corridor's end.

events.description: presses elevator call button and waits for doors to open
enters the elevator as doors open

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator, pressing the call button, and stepping inside the metal compartment

entered.detail: digital control panel with glowing green interface buttons
metal-walled elevator compartment with worn floor
interior floor selection panel with illuminated buttons

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the elevator at the hallway's end, presses the call button on the glowing panel, and enters the metal elevator compartment as the doors slide open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate, neon-lit confines of a cyberpunk bedroom out into a gritty industrial corridor. It begins by panning across a cluttered desk toward a futuristic sleeping pod bathed in cyan light, while a wall-mounted television flickers in the background. As the camera moves forward, the confined bedroom opens into a larger, lived-in living area filled with scattered trash and a vending machine, with natural light filtering through windows. The scene then shifts from the domestic interior to a narrow, grimy hallway where graffiti-covered walls and glowing neon signs replace the apartment's clutter. Finally, the camera advances through the corridor to reach a glowing call panel, entering the metal elevator compartment as the doors slide open.
